title: batrachium circinatum subsp. fucoides
intro: Batrachium circinatum subsp. fucoides, also known as the fucoides water-crowfoot, is a rare aquatic plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Batrachium circinatum subsp. fucoides include infusions and tinctures, which have been used to treat various ailments.
